---
title: ""
grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      margin-width: 200px
---

:::: {layout="[ 40, 60 ]"}

::: {#first-column}

![](images/Casamento%20Angelo%20e%20Veronica%20%20-117.jpg){width=800 fig-align="left" style="border-radius: %;"}

:::

::: {#second-column}

<!-- 
### Welcome! -->

<!-- [**Welcome!**]{style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 18pt; color: #496130;"} -->

**Welcome!**

<div style="text-align: justify; font-weight: 400; font-size: 13pt;">


I am a [Postdoctoral Fellow](https://www.pop.upenn.edu/bio/angelo-dos-santos) at the University of Pennsylvania and Scientific Production Coordinator for the [DZC project](https://web.sas.upenn.edu/dzc-en/).

I am an applied microeconomist working on development and environmental economics. I received my PhD from the University of Houston. 

My research addresses critical issues such as deforestation and air pollution, aiming to develop effective policies to mitigate these challenges. 

I am a nature enthusiast and soccer lover.

You can find my CV [here**](documents/cv_angelo_santos.pdf)

</div>

:::

::::
